'''damuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jhooming|jhooming]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jhooming|jhooming]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| damuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæmihith|dæmihith]] || [[word:dæmihij|dæmihij]] || [[word:dæmihish|dæmihish]] || [[word:dæmihi|dæmihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:damumuhuth|damumuhuth]] || [[word:damumuhuj|damumuhuj]] || [[word:damumuhush|damumuhush]] || [[word:damumuhu|damumuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:damuhuth|damuhuth]] || [[word:damuhuj|damuhuj]] || [[word:damuhush|damuhush]] || [[word:damuhu|damuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:damufhuth|damufhuth]] || [[word:damufhuj|damufhuj]] || [[word:damufhush|damufhush]] || [[word:damufhuf|damufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:damuhuthu|damuhuthu]] || [[word:damuhuju|damuhuju]] || [[word:damuhushu|damuhushu]] || [[word:damuhuku|damuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:damuhuth|damuhuth]] || [[word:damuhuj|damuhuj]] || [[word:damuhush|damuhush]] || [[word:damuhu|damuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:damuhuthul|damuhuthul]] || [[word:damuhujul|damuhujul]] || [[word:damuhushul|damuhushul]] || [[word:damuhukul|damuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:damuhuthuthu|damuhuthuthu]] || [[word:damuhujuju|damuhujuju]] || [[word:damuhushushu|damuhushushu]] || [[word:damuhuku|damuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:damuhuthun|damuhuthun]] || [[word:damuhujun|damuhujun]] || [[word:damuhushun|damuhushun]] || [[word:damuhukun|damuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:damuhuthuoro|damuhuthuoro]] || [[word:damuhujuoro|damuhujuoro]] || [[word:damuhushuoro|damuhushuoro]] || [[word:damuhukuoro|damuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
